title: Check if One String Swap Can Make Strings Equal
titleCn: 仅执行一次字符串交换能否使两个字符串相等

testcases.input: s1 = "bank", s2 = "kanb" Output: true Explanation: For example, swap the first character with the last character of s2 to make "bank".
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: For example, swap the first character with the last character of s2 to make "bank".

testcases.input: s1 = "attack", s2 = "defend" Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to make them equal with one string swap.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to make them equal with one string swap.

testcases.input: s1 = "kelb", s2 = "kelb" Output: true Explanation: The two strings are already equal, so no string swap operation is required.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The two strings are already equal, so no string swap operation is required.
